title: NBDSA fines Zee News ₹25,000 for intrusive interview of grieving mother
description: The News Broadcasting and Digital Standards Authority (NBDSA) recently imposed a fine of ₹25,000 on Zee News for airing an intrusive interview of a grieving mother of an accused in a murder case.NBDSA Chairperson, Justice AK Sikri held that Zee News had violated norms of decency and privacy, and directed the channel to remove the footage from all its platforms.The May 19 order came on a complaint filed by advocate Indrajeet Ghorpade over a June 10, 2025 programme that showed a Zee News reporter
